ea_prompt.parent_head_capture_note: Captured at SDO authoring time. EA must re-capture at the start of execution via `git rev-parse HEAD` on BOTH repos and substitute live values into the comprehension comment. If either head has advanced, EA proceeds against the live head (rebase if needed) and notes the delta in the comprehension comment.

attachment.reason: Authoritative scope; SS5.3 gray-area pre-decisions: DEC home (devplatform/docs/decisions/), DEC numbering, trusted_scope LOC threshold values (3000 LOC, 100 files) sourced from devplatform tools/autonomy_budget/config.yaml
Sprint 11 continuation; lessons L-12, L-13, L-15, L-19, L-22, L-24 cited herein; cross-repo working-set discipline; ledger Q1-1 schema for EA-1 ledger entry
Operational reference for DEC-16; DEC-16 SSDecision text RATIFIES what this doc already specifies, NOT changes it. Read end-to-end before authoring DEC-16.
Q1-1 per-file ledger schema for DEC-17; DEC-17 SSDecision RATIFIES the post-2026-04-22 convention this file documents.
Trusted_scope merge policy operational reference for DEC-18.
DEC-18 single source of truth for runaway_loc_threshold (3000) + runaway_file_threshold (100); DEC-18 cites these values VERBATIM from config; if config and DEC text drift, DEC text is the defect.
Sprint 8 SWAGR -- SS14.1 + gap #1. Confirm exact filename via Glob at EA start.

ea_prompt.pre_flight:
Sprint 11 EA-1 is the FIRST BlarAI sprint authoring formal numbered DECs. DEC home is `C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform\docs\decisions\` per SDV SS5.3 pre-decision. The directory DOES NOT YET EXIST on devplatform (verified at SDO authoring time); EA-1 creates it implicitly via the first file write.
DEC numbering: continuous integer sequence DEC-16, DEC-17, DEC-18. Verify NO conflicts:
cd C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform; git grep -lE 'DEC-1[678]' -- docs cd C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI; git grep -lE 'DEC-1[678]' -- docs
Expected: empty on both. If either returns content referencing one of these DEC numbers, STOP and escalate -- do NOT renumber unilaterally.
Fleet-Pause SOP. PAUSE the fleet before any checkout or git work:
$env:PYTHONPATH = "C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform"; python -c "from tools.autonomy_budget import state; state.pause_fleet('Sprint 11 EA-1 DEC bundle authoring', updated_by='ea_code', path='C:/Users/mrbla/devplatform/tools/autonomy_budget/state.json')" cd C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI; git commit --allow-empty -m "chore(ops): pause fleet -- Sprint 11 EA-1 DEC bundle authoring"
Resume LAST, before exit: $env:PYTHONPATH = "C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform"; python -c "from tools.autonomy_budget import state; state.resume_fleet(updated_by='ea_code', path='C:/Users/mrbla/devplatform/tools/autonomy_budget/state.json')" cd C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI; git commit --allow-empty -m "chore(ops): unpause fleet -- Sprint 11 EA-1 done"
API-NAME GOTCHA: function is `resume_fleet`, NOT `unpause_fleet`.
Parallel execution context (LA SDV v2). EA-2 may be running concurrently against disjoint working sets (BlarAI runbooks + devplatform Co-Lead wake template). DO NOT touch any EA-2 working-set path (see negative_constraints).
ea_prompt.comprehension_gate:
BEFORE any edits, checkouts, or branch creation, post a comprehension comment to Vikunja tracking task #410 prefixed `[agent:ea_code][phase:comprehension]` containing ALL of:
1. Milestone objective in your own words: what three DECs you are authoring, on which repo, why now (3-sprint micro-DEC carry-over closure), who consumes them downstream.
2. Per-deliverable work-item summary. WI-1 through WI-6 -- one sentence each in your own words.
3. Files to create/modify (absolute paths). EXACTLY FOUR files: - C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform\docs\decisions\DEC-16_parallel-sprint-authorization_v1.md (new) - C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform\docs\decisions\DEC-17_ledger-format-q1-1-permanence_v1.md (new) - C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform\docs\decisions\DEC-18_trusted-scope-loc-threshold_v1.md (new) - C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\docs\ledger\TS_sprint11_ea1_dec-bundle.md (new; TS = UTC YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS captured at EA start)
4. Source files to read (read-only). All required_attachments above.
5. EXACT deliverable structure -- recite VERBATIM. For each DEC file: front-matter -> SSMotivation -> SSDecision -> SSAlternatives considered -> SSCross-references. Each DEC >= 60 lines.
For the BlarAI ledger entry: Q1-1 schema per docs/ledger/README.md. Frontmatter (ledger_id, date, sprint_id=11, entry_type=EA, predecessor, branch=feature/p5-task11-ea1-ledger, merge_commit=null, disposition=COMPLETE) -> SSSummary -> SSDeliverables -> SSFiles Changed -> SSQuality Gate -> SSDEC References.
6. ORACLE expectation (verbatim, executed at EA close after both commits land):
cd C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform git diff PRE_HEAD...HEAD --name-only Expected (sorted): docs/decisions/DEC-16_parallel-sprint-authorization_v1.md docs/decisions/DEC-17_ledger-format-q1-1-permanence_v1.md docs/decisions/DEC-18_trusted-scope-loc-threshold_v1.md
cd C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI git diff main...feature/p5-task11-ea1-ledger --name-only Expected: docs/ledger/TS_sprint11_ea1_dec-bundle.md
Any other path on either side -> ORACLE violation; STOP and report.
7. Working-set declaration (L-15). Verbatim: "I write to exactly four absolute paths: three devplatform DEC files + one BlarAI ledger file. I read the operational governance docs and SWAGR sections cited in each DEC. I touch no other file in either repo. If I discover a defect in any source file or a contradiction between governance text and operational reality, I STOP and escalate via the comprehension comment; I do NOT 'reconcile' by unilaterally editing either side."
8. Mature-not-minimal acknowledgment (L-22). Verbatim: "Mature not minimal: each DEC >= 60 lines; aggregate >= 180 lines. SSMotivation and SSAlternatives considered are SUBSTANTIVE (multi-paragraph each); SSDecision is a plain-statement paragraph. Padding to hit the floor is rejected."
9. DEC ratification discipline (L-24). Verbatim: "These DECs RATIFY existing practice. Each DEC's SSDecision describes what the fleet ALREADY does per the cited governance doc -- DEC text aligns to operational mechanics, NOT the inverse. If I find a contradiction between cited governance doc and operational reality, I STOP and escalate. I do NOT 'reconcile' by editing either side."
10. Cross-repo ordering acknowledgment (L-19). Verbatim: "EA-1 is primarily a devplatform-side commit (3 DEC files in one commit) plus a small BlarAI-side ledger entry. Cross-repo ordering: devplatform commit lands FIRST (direct-to-main per Stage 6.7.5); then BlarAI ledger entry lands SECOND, citing the devplatform commit hash."
11. BlarAI-side path choice (SDO pre-decision). SDO has pre-selected the tiny BlarAI feature branch path: feature/p5-task11-ea1-ledger containing only the ledger entry, merged via Co-Lead trusted_scope. EA recites this choice in the comprehension comment.
12. No-freelance-cross-repo-refactor acknowledgment (L-19). Verbatim: "Sprint 11 is documentation + investigation + (one optional new BlarAI helper script in EA-2). DO NOT refactor any devplatform fleet code in this EA."
13. Risks and ambiguities. State any unresolved understanding before starting.
After posting the comprehension comment, apply label `Gate:Pending-SDO` (id 9) on Vikunja task #410 and STOP. WAIT for SDO Phase 1a review verdict before doing any work. Do NOT bundle downstream work with the comprehension comment.

milestone.objective: Author three formal numbered DEC documents on devplatform main (DEC-16 parallel-sprint authorization + shared-artifact audit discipline; DEC-17 Q1-1 per-file ledger format permanence; DEC-18 trusted_scope LOC threshold policy) as a single thematic devplatform commit, plus one BlarAI-side ledger entry recording the devplatform commit hash. DECs RATIFY existing operational practice -- they do NOT change practice. Close the 3-sprint micro-DEC carry-over backlog.
milestone.branch: feature/p5-task11-ea1-ledger (BlarAI side); devplatform direct-to-main for DEC files
milestone.size_rationale: Three DEC files authored from scratch with cross-reference grounding to existing governance docs; aggregate ~180-240 lines across the DECs plus a ~40-60 line ledger entry.

work_items.wi: WI-1: Pre-flight conflict check. Verify no prior DEC-16/17/18 reservation: cd C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform; git grep -lE 'DEC-1[678]' -- docs cd C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI; git grep -lE 'DEC-1[678]' -- docs Expected: empty on both. If either non-empty, STOP and escalate. Verify reference files exist via Test-Path: - C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform\docs\governance\parallel-sprints.md - C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform\docs\governance\merge-policy.md - C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform\tools\autonomy_budget\config.yaml - C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\docs\ledger\README.md All four MUST return True. Capture verbatim output in the ledger entry's SSQuality Gate section.

WI-2: Author DEC-16 (Parallel-Sprint Authorization + Shared-Artifact Audit Discipline). New file: C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform\docs\decisions\DEC-16_parallel-sprint-authorization_v1.md
Sections (all required): SSMotivation (>= 2 substantive paragraphs): cite Sprint 8 SWAGR SS14.1 + Sprint 9 SWAGR gap #7 + Sprint 10 SWAGR SS5.4. State that two of the three preceding sprints exercised parallel-sprint execution operationally (via set_parallel_sprints_authorized) without a formal numbered DEC. SSDecision (1 paragraph): state that the operational mechanism tools.autonomy_budget.state.set_parallel_sprints_authorized(...) is the AUTHORITATIVE entry point, gated by LA approval; SDO scanners and Co-Lead Phase 3 hooks read the boolean before cross-sprint scheduling. Also state the shared-artifact audit discipline runs at SDO Phase 2 authoring time for every EA in every parallel sprint. RATIFICATION: text aligns to what parallel-sprints.md already specifies; this DEC formalizes, not changes. SSAlternatives considered (>= 2): e.g. (a) leave informal -- rejected because three sprints of de-facto practice compounds auditor confusion; (b) per-sprint authorization annotation in active_tasks.yaml only -- rejected because state.json is the runtime source-of-truth and YAML duplication invites drift; pick candidates matching operational reality. SSCross-references (absolute paths, each Test-Path verified): - C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform\docs\governance\parallel-sprints.md - C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform\tools\autonomy_budget\state.json - Sprint 8 SWAGR SS14.1, Sprint 9 SWAGR gap #7, Sprint 10 SWAGR SS5.4
Length floor: >= 60 lines.

WI-3: Author DEC-17 (Q1-1 Per-File Ledger Format Permanence). New file: C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform\docs\decisions\DEC-17_ledger-format-q1-1-permanence_v1.md
Sections: SSMotivation (>= 2 paragraphs): cite Sprint 8 SWAGR gap #1 + Sprint 9 SWAGR gap #1 + Sprint 10 SWAGR SS15.3. State the three-sprint recurring shape: post-2026-04-22 the monolithic POST_OPERATIONAL_MATURATION_LEDGER.md was frozen at Entry 52; new entries land as per-file under docs/ledger/; each sprint's SWAGR continued to surface the rule as "convention" rather than codified DEC. SSDecision (1 paragraph): state that all ledger entries authored on or after 2026-04-22 land as per-file markdown under C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\docs\ledger\ using the schema documented in docs/ledger/README.md; the monolithic file remains FROZEN archive for Entries 1-52 and is NEVER appended to. RATIFICATION: aligns to what docs/ledger/README.md already specifies. SSAlternatives considered (>= 2): e.g. (a) revert to monolithic with daily merge resolution -- rejected (Sprint 8 EA-1 / Sprint 9 EA-1 collision is the canonical unresolvable case); (b) per-sprint subdirectories -- rejected (flat timestamp-keyed structure preserves chronology without navigation overhead). SSCross-references: - C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\docs\ledger\README.md - C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\docs\POST_OPERATIONAL_MATURATION_LEDGER.md (frozen archive) - Sprint 8 SWAGR gap #1, Sprint 9 SWAGR gap #1, Sprint 10 SWAGR SS15.3
Length floor: >= 60 lines.

WI-4: Author DEC-18 (Trusted_Scope LOC Threshold Policy). New file: C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform\docs\decisions\DEC-18_trusted-scope-loc-threshold_v1.md
Sections: SSMotivation (>= 2 paragraphs): cite Sprint 8 SWAGR SS14.1. State the operational pattern: la_merge_approve.ps1 reads runaway_loc_threshold (3000) and runaway_file_threshold (100) from tools/autonomy_budget/config.yaml and escalates to LA on threshold breach. The thresholds have governed trusted_scope merges across Sprints 8/9/10 without formal DEC ratification; DEC-14.5 introduced the concept, DEC-18 formalizes the specific values. SSDecision (1 paragraph): state that trusted_scope merges proceed without LA inline approval IF AND ONLY IF combined diff < 3000 LOC AND < 100 files AND no out-of-working-set file is touched; on any breach, la_merge_approve.ps1 escalates per DEC-14.5. Values live in config.yaml as SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH; DEC-18 text quotes the values verbatim but config is authoritative for any future tuning. SSAlternatives considered (>= 2): e.g. (a) lower thresholds (1000/30) -- rejected because actual Sprint 8/9/10 trusted_scope merges averaged 200-800 LOC; (b) no LOC ceiling, file-count only -- rejected because a single-file >5000 LOC refactor is exactly the runaway shape DEC-14.5 catches. SSCross-references: - C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform\docs\governance\merge-policy.md - C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform\tools\autonomy_budget\config.yaml (SoT) - C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform\tools\autonomy_budget\la_merge_approve.ps1 - Sprint 8 SWAGR SS14.1
Length floor: >= 60 lines.

WI-5: Commit devplatform side. Single thematic commit: cd C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform git add docs/decisions/DEC-16_parallel-sprint-authorization_v1.md git add docs/decisions/DEC-17_ledger-format-q1-1-permanence_v1.md git add docs/decisions/DEC-18_trusted-scope-loc-threshold_v1.md git commit -m "[sprint:11][role:ea_code][phase:completion] DEC bundle: parallel-sprint authorization + ledger Q1-1 permanence + trusted_scope LOC threshold" (Full commit body cites the three DECs + the SWAGR sections they close + notes that the BlarAI ledger entry follows in a separate BlarAI commit.) Capture the resulting commit hash; insert into the BlarAI ledger entry SSDEC References.

WI-6: BlarAI-side ledger entry on feature branch. Path: C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\docs\ledger\TS_sprint11_ea1_dec-bundle.md where TS = UTC YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS captured at EA start.
Frontmatter (Q1-1 schema): --- ledger_id: TS_sprint11_ea1_dec-bundle date: YYYY-MM-DD sprint_id: 11 entry_type: EA predecessor: ledger_id of last existing entry in docs/ledger/ at EA start branch: feature/p5-task11-ea1-ledger merge_commit: null disposition: COMPLETE ---
Body sections: SSSummary (3-5 sentences). SSDeliverables (bulleted list of three DEC files + this ledger entry). SSFiles Changed (two sub-tables: devplatform commit hash + 3 paths; BlarAI commit + this ledger file). SSQuality Gate (verbatim outputs from WI-1 pre-flight). SSDEC References (three entries: DEC-16/17/18 -> devplatform commit hash).
Then commit on BlarAI: cd C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI git checkout -b feature/p5-task11-ea1-ledger git add docs/ledger/TS_sprint11_ea1_dec-bundle.md git commit -m "[sprint:11][role:ea_code][phase:completion] Sprint 11 EA-1 ledger entry -- DEC bundle"
Do NOT merge to BlarAI main yourself. Leave for Co-Lead trusted_scope merge.

ea_prompt.negative_constraints:
DO NOT, under any circumstances:
1. Touch existing governance docs. parallel-sprints.md, merge-policy.md, ledger/README.md, autonomy_budget/config.yaml, autonomy_budget/state.json, la_merge_approve.ps1 are ALL READ-ONLY inputs. If a discrepancy surfaces between governance text and operational reality, STOP and escalate.
2. Amend ADRs or any other DEC. EA-1 authors DEC-16/17/18 only.
3. Edit CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, copilot-instructions.md, or any doctrine file on either repo. Doctrine work is EA-5's purview.
4. Touch any EA-2 working-set path (per LA parallel authorization): - C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\docs\runbooks\active_state_refresh.md - C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\tools\active_state_refresh.{py,ps1} - C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform\docs\scheduled\wake_templates\co_lead_architect.md
5. Touch any future-EA path. No edits to docs/sprints/_templates/ (EA-3), docs/sprints/sprint_11/test_baseline_drift_investigation.md (EA-4), .github/copilot-instructions.md, tools/vikunja_mcp/README.md, docs/scheduled/wake_templates/sprint_auditor.md (EA-5).
6. Touch any production source code or test file. No edits to services/, shared/, launcher/, tests/, pyproject.toml, conftest.py on either repo.
7. Refactor any devplatform fleet code. EA-1 ONLY writes new DEC files under docs/decisions/.
8. Renumber DECs unilaterally. If WI-1 grep surfaces a prior reservation, STOP and escalate via comprehension comment.
9. Bundle downstream work with the comprehension comment. Post comprehension; apply Gate:Pending-SDO; STOP. Wait for SDO Phase 1a verdict.
10. Push to a remote main without going through Co-Lead trusted_scope merge for BlarAI side. Devplatform DEC commit is direct-to-main per Stage 6.7.5 (committed locally; Co-Lead picks up any remote-push concerns).
ea_prompt.mature_not_minimal: Each of three DECs >= 60 lines. Aggregate DEC content >= 180 lines. BlarAI ledger entry >= 40 lines. SSMotivation: >= 2 substantive paragraphs. SSDecision: 1 plain-statement paragraph. SSAlternatives considered: >= 2 alternatives with multi-sentence rationale each. SSCross-references: bulleted list of >= 4 entries (absolute paths + SWAGR sections). Padding to hit the floor is rejected.
ea_prompt.cross_repo_ordering: EA-1 commits to devplatform main FIRST (direct-to-main per Stage 6.7.5), capturing the resulting commit hash. THEN commits to BlarAI on the feature/p5-task11-ea1-ledger branch with the ledger entry citing the devplatform commit hash in its body. Co-Lead merges the BlarAI feature branch via trusted_scope at Phase 3.
ea_prompt.oracle:
At EA close, after both commits land:
cd C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform git diff PRE_HEAD...HEAD --name-only Expected (sorted): docs/decisions/DEC-16_parallel-sprint-authorization_v1.md docs/decisions/DEC-17_ledger-format-q1-1-permanence_v1.md docs/decisions/DEC-18_trusted-scope-loc-threshold_v1.md
cd C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI git diff main...feature/p5-task11-ea1-ledger --name-only Expected: docs/ledger/TS_sprint11_ea1_dec-bundle.md
Any other path on either side = ORACLE violation. EA captures both diffs verbatim in the completion comment on Vikunja task #410.
ea_prompt.completion:
After ORACLE passes, post `[agent:ea_code][phase:completion]` comment on Vikunja tracking task #410 containing: 1. Both commit hashes (devplatform DEC commit + BlarAI ledger commit). 2. Both git diff --name-only outputs verbatim. 3. Line counts for each of the three DEC files + the ledger entry. 4. The TS timestamp used across all four files. 5. Confirmation that all Test-Path checks in WI-1 returned True. 6. Confirmation that no negative constraint was violated.
Apply label Gate:Pending-SDO (id 9) on task #410. STOP. WAIT for SDO Phase 1b completion-review verdict.
Resume the fleet LAST BEFORE posting the completion comment -- ensures the fleet is unpaused for SDO's review-wake to fire cleanly.
ea_prompt.budget_envelope: Effective session cap: 60 min (+ active Budget Lift if granted). TTG: 2 h wall-clock. Trusted_scope merge eligibility: yes (Sprint 11 EA-1 working set is 4 new files; aggregate <= ~300 LOC; well under DEC-18 thresholds).
ea_prompt.links: - Continuation: docs/P5_TASK11_SDO_CONTINUATION_v1.0.xml - Sprint 11 SDV (v2): docs/sprints/sprint_11/strategic_design_vision.md - DEC-13 report format: docs/DEC13_REPORT_QUEUE_PROPOSAL_v1.xml - LA SDV v2 parallel-EA amendment: Vikunja #410 comment 550 (2026-05-11)
